location: Starting weapon of the Vagabond class; otherwise purchasable anytime from Twin Maiden Husks at the Roundtable Hold for 1,000 runes.
tactics: Start as the Vagabond class to have it equipped from the very beginning.
Otherwise, buy it anytime from Twin Maiden Husks in the Roundtable Hold for 1,000 runes.
No combat or exploration required — a straightforward hub purchase.
lore: A double-edged straight sword balancing solid slashes with sharp piercing thrusts — an unremarkable but reliable soldier's blade.

builds.name: Beginner Str/Dex
builds.why: Even D/D Strength-Dexterity scaling paired with Vagabond's naturally high starting Vigor/Strength/Dexterity make it a strong zero-investment starter weapon.
